## What phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Phase 2 (backprop visualization, inference improvements)
- [ ] Phase 3 (calculus panel, loss surface, test batch)
- [ ] New phase / out of scope — needs discussion

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature. If it involves math or a new visualization, be specific about what is computed and how it maps to what the user sees. -->

## Why is this useful for learning?

<!-- What concept does this help a learner understand? How does it connect to what PyTorch or other frameworks actually do? -->

## Mathematical correctness check

<!-- If this feature involves showing computed values, describe how those values are computed. The project does not accept visualizations backed by approximations or mocked data unless clearly labeled. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Are there simpler ways to teach the same concept? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, references, or related issues. -->
